description: Fix five structural root causes of recurring workflow failures: shared task completion type, inference quality gate, agent session lifecycle, pre-flight dispatch check, stale model pruning.

phases.title: Shared TaskCompletionBody in hex-core
phases.description: Add TaskCompletionBody + TaskStatus to hex-core/src/types/. Update hex-agent task_executor.rs and stdb_task_poller.rs to use the shared type. Update hex-nexus swarms route handler to deserialize the same type.
phases.acceptance: cargo check passes across workspace; mismatched status string is a compile error

phases.title: Inference quality gate on registration
phases.description: In hex-cli inference add command: after persisting provider, call inference_test internally. If response is empty or HTTP error, delete the record and return an error. Add --prune flag to hex inference discover that removes all registered providers returning empty.
phases.acceptance: hex inference add with a non-existent model ID fails with clear error; existing empty-returning models removed by --prune

phases.title: Agent session lifecycle — disconnect on session-end
phases.description: Add POST /api/hex-agents/:id/disconnect route to hex-nexus that sets endedAt=now, status=completed. Wire into hook-handler for session-end event: call hex agent disconnect $CLAUDE_SESSION_ID. Add hex agent disconnect CLI command.
phases.acceptance: After session ends, agent record shows status=completed and endedAt timestamp; no more perpetual running sessions

phases.title: Pre-flight check before task dispatch
phases.description: In supervisor task dispatch (workplan_executor.rs or swarm_phase), before assigning a task to an agent: (1) verify agent heartbeat is within 45s, (2) verify nexus /api/health is reachable. On failure, log warning and skip to next available agent or surface error.
phases.acceptance: Dispatching to a dead agent logs warning and skips; healthy agent receives task normally

phases.title: Stale model pruning on nexus start
phases.description: On hex nexus start, after loading inference providers, run a background prune pass: test each registered OpenRouter provider with a minimal prompt, remove those returning empty content. Log pruned models as warnings.
phases.acceptance: Placeholder model IDs (non-existent gpt-5.x, grok-4.x) are removed from provider list on startup
